BadRequest.description: Invalid request payload or query parameters

Forbidden.description: Request is authenticated but not allowed

Money.description: Decimal monetary value serialized as string

info.description:
HTTP API for the MoneyApp finance core.

Notes for local testing:
- All money values are strings, not numbers, to preserve decimal precision.
- Telegram auth expects a signed payload from the Telegram Login Widget and verifies it using `TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN`.
- In development, when `AUTH_ALLOW_INSECURE_DEV_AUTH=true`, Telegram and Yandex auth endpoints can work in pass-through mode.
- Protected endpoints use Bearer auth with the access token returned by login.
info.summary: Personal Life OS finance MVP backend
info.title: MoneyApp Finance Core API

post.description: Accepts a signed payload from the Telegram Login Widget and returns JWT + refresh tokens.
In development mode, this endpoint accepts provider identity fields directly.
